HGSS.554.0000:
A Pokémon you get in a trade
grows quickly.\f
But if you don’t have the right Gym
Badge, they may disobey you.
HGSS.554.0001:
I collect Pokémon.
Do you have BELLSPROUT?\f
Want to trade it for my ONIX? [0200,0000]
HGSS.554.0002:
Yay! I got myself BELLSPROUT!
Thanks!
HGSS.554.0003:
Huh? That’s not BELLSPROUT.\r
What a letdown...
HGSS.554.0004: You don’t want to trade? Aww...
HGSS.554.0005: Hi, how’s my old ONIX doing?
